question_text: Which statement best describes energy conservation?

options.label: A
options.text: Energy is created when we burn fuel

options.label: B
options.text: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transferred or converted

options.label: C
options.text: Energy disappears when we use it

explanation: The law of energy conservation states that energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transferred between stores or converted from one form to another. This is a fundamental principle of physics.
